settings.agents.add_regex_patterns_to_sh.en: Add regex patterns to show the coding agent toolbar for matching commands.
settings.agents.add_regex_patterns_to_sh.zh: 添加正则表达式以在匹配命令时显示代码代理工具栏。

settings.agents.allow_the_warp_agent_to_.en: Allow the Warp Agent to call these MCP servers.
settings.agents.allow_the_warp_agent_to_.zh: 允许代理调用这些 MCP 服务器。

settings.agents.allow_the_warp_agent_to_.en: Allow the Warp Agent to generate an outline of your codebase that can be used for context. No code is ever stored on our servers.
settings.agents.allow_the_warp_agent_to_.zh: 允许代理生成代码库概览用于上下文分析。代码不会存储在服务器上。

settings.agents.ask_unless_auto_approve.zh: 除非自动审批否则询问

settings.agents.auto_dismiss_rich_input_.en: Auto dismiss Rich Input after prompt submission
settings.agents.auto_dismiss_rich_input_.zh: 提交提示后自动关闭富输入框

settings.agents.auto_open_rich_input_whe.en: Auto open Rich Input when a coding agent session starts
settings.agents.auto_open_rich_input_whe.zh: 代码代理会话启动时自动打开富输入框

settings.agents.auto_show_hide_rich_inpu.en: Auto show/hide Rich Input based on agent status
settings.agents.auto_show_hide_rich_inpu.zh: 根据代理状态自动显示/隐藏富输入框

settings.agents.auto_spawn_servers_from_.zh: 从第三方代理自动启动服务器

settings.agents.auto_sync_plans_to_warp_.zh: 自动同步计划到 Warp Drive：

settings.agents.autodetect_agent_prompts.en: Autodetect agent prompts in terminal input
settings.agents.autodetect_agent_prompts.zh: 自动检测终端输入中的代理提示

settings.agents.autodetect_terminal_comm.en: Autodetect terminal commands in agent input
settings.agents.autodetect_terminal_comm.zh: 自动检测代理输入中的终端命令

settings.agents.automatically_detect_and.en: Automatically detect and spawn MCP servers from globally-scoped third-party AI agent configuration files (e.g. in your home directory). Servers detected inside a repository are never spawned automatically and must be enabled individually from the MCP settings page.
settings.agents.automatically_detect_and.zh: 自动检测并启动全局范围第三方 AI 代理配置文件（如主目录）中的 MCP 服务器。仓库内检测到的服务器不会自动启动，需在 MCP 设置页单独启用。

settings.agents.commands_listed_here_wil.en: Commands listed here will never trigger natural language detection.
settings.agents.commands_listed_here_wil.zh: 此处列出的命令不会触发自然语言检测。

settings.agents.computer_use_in_cloud_ag.zh: 云代理中的计算机使用

settings.agents.controls_how_reasoning_t.en: Controls how reasoning/thinking traces are displayed.
settings.agents.controls_how_reasoning_t.zh: 控制推理/思考轨迹的显示方式。

settings.agents.enable_computer_use_in_c.en: Enable computer use in cloud agent conversations started from the Warp app.
settings.agents.enable_computer_use_in_c.zh: 在 Warp 应用发起的云代理对话中启用计算机使用。

settings.agents.enable_multi_agent_orche.en: Enable multi-agent orchestration, allowing the agent to spawn and coordinate parallel sub-agents.
settings.agents.enable_multi_agent_orche.zh: 启用多代理编排，允许代理生成并协调并行子代理。

settings.agents.enabling_natural_languag.en: Enabling natural language detection will detect when natural language is written in the terminal input, and then automatically switch to Agent Mode for AI queries.
settings.agents.enabling_natural_languag.zh: 启用自然语言检测后，将自动识别终端输入中的自然语言并切换至代理模式进行 AI 查询。

settings.agents.give_the_agent_file_acce.en: Give the agent file access to certain directories.
settings.agents.give_the_agent_file_acce.zh: 授予代理对指定目录的文件访问权限。

settings.agents.hide_oz_changelog_in_new.en: Hide Oz changelog in new agent conversation view
settings.agents.hide_oz_changelog_in_new.zh: 隐藏 Oz 更新日志

settings.agents.include_agent_executed_c.zh: 在历史记录中包含代理执行的命令

settings.agents.let_ai_generate_a_title_.en: Let AI generate a title for your shared block based on the command and output.
settings.agents.let_ai_generate_a_title_.zh: 让 AI 根据命令及输出为共享块自动生成标题。

settings.agents.let_ai_generate_commit_m.en: Let AI generate commit messages and pull request titles and descriptions.
settings.agents.let_ai_generate_commit_m.zh: 让 AI 自动生成提交消息及 PR 标题和描述。

settings.agents.let_ai_suggest_code_diff.en: Let AI suggest code diffs and queries as inline banners in the blocklist, based on recent commands and their outputs.
settings.agents.let_ai_suggest_code_diff.zh: 让 AI 根据近期命令及输出，以内嵌横幅形式建议代码差异和查询。

settings.agents.let_ai_suggest_natural_l.en: Let AI suggest natural language autosuggestions, based on recent commands and their outputs.
settings.agents.let_ai_suggest_natural_l.zh: 让 AI 根据近期命令及输出提供自然语言自动建议。

settings.agents.let_ai_suggest_natural_l.en: Let AI suggest natural language prompts, as inline banners in the input, based on recent commands and their outputs.
settings.agents.let_ai_suggest_natural_l.zh: 让 AI 根据近期命令及输出，以内嵌横幅形式建议自然语言提示。

settings.agents.let_ai_suggest_rules_to_.en: Let AI suggest rules to save based on your interactions.
settings.agents.let_ai_suggest_rules_to_.zh: 让 AI 根据您的交互建议要保存的规则。

settings.agents.let_ai_suggest_the_next_.en: Let AI suggest the next command to run based on your command history, outputs, and common workflows.
settings.agents.let_ai_suggest_the_next_.zh: 让 AI 根据命令历史、输出及常用工作流建议下一条命令。

settings.agents.oz_can_add_attribution_t.en: Oz can add attribution to commit messages and pull requests it creates
settings.agents.oz_can_add_attribution_t.zh: Oz 可在其创建的提交消息和 PR 中添加归因信息

settings.agents.preferred_layout_when_op.en: Preferred layout when opening existing agent conversations
settings.agents.preferred_layout_when_op.zh: 打开现有代理对话时的首选布局

settings.agents.profiles_let_you_define_.en: Profiles let you define how your Agent operates — from the actions it can take and when it needs approval, to the models it uses for tasks like coding and planning. You can also scope them to individual projects.
settings.agents.profiles_let_you_define_.zh: 配置文件让您定义代理的运作方式：包括可执行的操作、何时需要审批，以及用于编码和规划等任务的模型。还可以将其限定到特定项目。

settings.agents.regular_expressions_to_m.en: Regular expressions to match commands that can be automatically executed by the Warp Agent.
settings.agents.regular_expressions_to_m.zh: 匹配代理可自动执行的命令的正则表达式。

settings.agents.regular_expressions_to_m.en: Regular expressions to match commands that the Warp Agent should always ask permission to execute.
settings.agents.regular_expressions_to_m.zh: 匹配代理始终需要询问权限才能执行的命令的正则表达式。

settings.agents.requires_the_warp_plugin.en: Requires the Warp plugin for your coding agent
settings.agents.requires_the_warp_plugin.zh: 需要为代码代理安装 Warp 插件

settings.agents.rules_help_the_warp_agen.en: Rules help the Warp Agent follow your conventions, whether for codebases or specific workflows.
settings.agents.rules_help_the_warp_agen.zh: 规则帮助代理遵循您的开发规范，无论是代码库还是特定工作流。

settings.agents.set_the_boundaries_for_h.en: Set the boundaries for how your Agent operates. Choose what it can access, how much autonomy it has, and when it must ask for your approval. You can also fine-tune behavior around natural language input, codebase awareness, and more.
settings.agents.set_the_boundaries_for_h.zh: 设置代理的操作边界：访问权限、自主程度以及需要确认的时机。也可微调自然语言输入和代码库感知等行为。

settings.agents.show_oz_changelog_in_new.en: Show Oz changelog in new agent conversation view
settings.agents.show_oz_changelog_in_new.zh: 在新对话视图中显示 Oz 更新日志

settings.agents.show_oz_changelog_in_new.en: Show Oz changelog in new conversation view
settings.agents.show_oz_changelog_in_new.zh: 在新对话中显示 Oz 更新日志

settings.agents.show_conversation_histor.en: Show conversation history in tools panel
settings.agents.show_conversation_histor.zh: 在工具面板中显示对话历史

settings.agents.show_model_picker_in_pro.zh: 在提示中显示模型选择器

settings.agents.some_of_your_permissions.en: Some of your permissions are managed by your workspace.
settings.agents.some_of_your_permissions.zh: 部分权限由您的工作区管理。

settings.agents.the_warp_agent_can_lever.en: The Warp Agent can leverage your Warp Drive Contents to tailor responses to your personal and team developer workflows and environments. This includes any Workflows, Notebooks, and Environment Variables.
settings.agents.the_warp_agent_can_lever.zh: 代理可利用 Warp Drive 内容（工作流、笔记本、环境变量）定制响应以匹配个人和团队开发环境。

settings.agents.the_warp_agent_will_alwa.en: The Warp Agent will always ask for permission before calling any MCP servers on this list.
settings.agents.the_warp_agent_will_alwa.zh: 代理调用此列表中的 MCP 服务器前始终会请求许可。

settings.agents.this_is_the_limit_of_ai_.en: This is the {} limit of AI credits for your account.
settings.agents.this_is_the_limit_of_ai_.zh: 这是您账户 AI 积分的 {} 限额。

settings.agents.this_model_serves_as_the.en: This model serves as the primary engine behind the Warp Agent. It powers most interactions and invokes other models for tasks like planning or code generation when necessary. Warp may automatically switch to alternate models based on model availability or for auxiliary tasks such as conversation summarization.
settings.agents.this_model_serves_as_the.zh: 此模型是 Warp 代理的主引擎，支撑大多数交互，并在需要时调用其他模型完成规划或代码生成等任务。Warp 可能根据模型可用性或辅助任务自动切换模型。

settings.agents.to_use_ai_features_pleas.en: To use AI features, please create an account.
settings.agents.to_use_ai_features_pleas.zh: 请先创建账户以使用 AI 功能。

settings.agents.use_aws_bedrock_credenti.zh: 使用 AWS Bedrock 凭证

settings.agents.use_your_own_api_keys_fr.en: Use your own API keys from model providers for the Warp Agent to use. API keys are stored locally and never synced to the cloud. Using auto models or models from providers you have not provided API keys for will consume Warp credits.
settings.agents.use_your_own_api_keys_fr.zh: 使用来自模型提供商的自有 API 密钥。密钥仅本地存储，不同步至云端。使用自动模型或未提供密钥的提供商模型将消耗 Warp 积分。

settings.agents.warp_drive_as_agent_cont.zh: 将 Warp Drive 作为代理上下文

settings.agents.when_enabled_agent_reque.en: When enabled, agent requests may be routed to one of Warp's provided models in the event of an error. Warp will prioritize using your API keys over your Warp credits.
settings.agents.when_enabled_agent_reque.zh: 启用后，代理请求在出错时将路由到 Warp 提供的模型。Warp 优先使用您的 API 密钥而非 Warp 积分。

settings.agents.when_enabled_the_login_c.en: When enabled, the login command will run automatically when AWS Bedrock credentials expire.
settings.agents.when_enabled_the_login_c.zh: 启用后，AWS Bedrock 凭证过期时将自动运行登录命令。

settings.agents.you_haven_t_added_any_mc.en: You haven't added any MCP servers yet. Once you do, you'll be able to control how much autonomy the Warp Agent has when interacting with them.
settings.agents.you_haven_t_added_any_mc.zh: 尚未添加 MCP 服务器。添加后，您可以控制代理与其交互时的自主程度。

settings.agents.your_organization_disall.en: Your organization disallows AI when the active pane contains content from a remote session
settings.agents.your_organization_disall.zh: 当前面板包含远程会话内容时，组织禁止使用 AI。
